    • Uses of DecorationFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.coercion

      Subclasses of DecorationFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.coercion 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  CoercedBitmapFigure
      Bitmap Figure that is associated to an anchor and located according to the anchor position.
      class  CoercedTextFigure
      Text Figure that is associated to an anchor and located according to the anchor position.

    • Uses of DecorationFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration

      Subclasses of DecorationFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a bitmap.
      class  BlockDecorationFigure
      Abstract class to present a decoration figure as a block.
      class  EllipseFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing an ellipse.
      class  PolylineFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a polyline.
      class  RectangleFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a rectangle.
      class  TextFigure
      A decoration figure that is drawing a text.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Undoable JFigureView.importFigure(DecorationFigure figure)
      Import the specified figure into this editor and replies an undoable edit.
